heading: Time of appointing electors
label: 1 Time of appointing electors
text: The electors of President and Vice President shall be appointed, in each State, on election day, in accordance with the laws of the State enacted prior to election day.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1, , , related to time of appointing electors, prior to repeal by , , .act June 25, 1948, ch. 64462 Stat. 672Pub. L. 117–328, div. P, title I, § 102(a)136 Stat. 5233Dec. 29, 2022
